sources.label: StockTitan - Aviat Networks files updated auditor consent (routine 8-K)
StockTitan - Aviat Networks to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
Aviat Networks FQ3 2026 results (May 4, 2026 - last fundamental datapoint)

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 6; the only filings are a routine auditor-consent 8-K (June 3) and an investor-conference notice, and today's -1.77% is small-cap drift. Yesterday's down move already reconciled the adjusted-score rank, so with nothing genuinely new the scaling-page rank should hold at 35.
verdicts.bull: Under-owned $230M microwave-backhaul name, -14% YTD with thesis intact, so residual asymmetry is improving as the price drifts lower; private-network and defense/utility backhaul demand gives optionality not priced in.
verdicts.neutral: FQ3 revenue of $100M was down 11.2% y/y with a GAAP net loss, and there has been no contract or guidance news since; the stock is cheap but lacks a near-term catalyst, justifying its low-table position on the scaling list.
verdicts.bear: Revenue is shrinking while AI-network capex flows to fiber/optics and data-center interconnect, not microwave backhaul; AVNW risks being a value trap whose bottleneck relevance to AI scaling is tangential at best.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: FY2026 Q4/full-year results and any large private-network or rural-broadband contract win that re-establishes growth.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Continued revenue decline confirming microwave backhaul is structurally bypassed by fiber in AI-era network buildouts.
